set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: represent compressed sparse structure independently from numeric values while preserving Gale storage encapsulation.

Scope and acceptance:
- Add checked immutable CSR and CSC pattern values, sharing one internal major/minor invariant model where useful.
- Keep pointer and index storage private; expose safe dimensions, nnz, equality/hash, traversal, lanes, and transpose semantics.
- Allow a validated pattern to bind numeric values through exactly one owned copy or a single-owner builder.
- Specify explicit-zero behavior: pattern-preserving value updates retain structure; pruning is an explicit structure-changing operation.
- Preserve existing COO duplicate and canonicalization behavior.
- Cover invalid offsets/indices, empty shapes, transpose, structural equality, repeated pattern reuse, graph adjacency use, and JVM/Scala.js ownership tests.
set.title: Introduce immutable compressed sparsity patterns and numeric rebinding
